creator: sf@FreeBSD.org
text:
At Wed, 6 Jun 2001 15:36:46 +0100 (BST),
markk@knigma.org wrote:
> Direct rendering kernel modules (e.g. drm.ko, mga.ko etc.) for XFree86-4.1.0,
> are not built. These are required for hardware GL acceleration. My attempts
> to manually build these have (so far), failed.

kernel moduels that come with XFree86-4.1.0 is _broken_ for FreeBSD.
No one on the earth can build. Feel free to fix it anyway. :)

-- 
FUJISHIMA Satsuki
